Oconee Station Building, 500 Oconee Station Rd, Walhalla, SC 29691, USA
Old, productive fig tree next to the historical station house. Unsure of exact variety, likely something similar to brown turkey Access: Public.

Just to the right of moody spring there is a small black berry bush. Don't expect to "fill a bucket" but if you want a couple little fruity bites while on an adventure you may get em here. Access: Public. Falling Fruit season: June-August.
